top_signals.title: Watch: Kevin Warsh sworn in as Fed chair as Trump seeks interest rate cuts
top_signals.summary: Despite President Donald Trump's demands for lower interest rates, markets are betting the Fed will stay on hold through most, if not all, of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: To infinity and beyond, with the SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Ordinary investors can at last bet directly on AI’s potential — with caveats
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
